decisions.rationale: No backend brief provided. Roofing contractor site requires marketing frontend only. Backend (Sanity CMS, Resend, PostHog) wired via env vars post-build.
No user accounts or gated content. Marketing-only surface. INV3 check is not-applicable.
CMS pages (blog, reviews) render from mock adapter in dev. Upgrade path: wire real Sanity project ID + dataset + API key → re-run smoke tests → promote to production_candidate.

decisions.decision: Root package.json shim at repo root
decisions.rationale: Developer ergonomics require npm run dev/build/lint/test to work from repo root. Shim proxies to web/. File lives outside web/ and is exempt from the web/-only output rule.

decisions.decision: Privacy and Terms as Tier 1 auto-generated routes
decisions.rationale: site-inventory.md classifies /privacy-policy and /terms-of-service as Tier 1 infrastructure. The planning briefs pages/privacy.md and pages/terms.md are content reference only.

decisions.decision: Sanity v3 with mock adapter in frontend_focus mode
decisions.rationale: No Sanity project credentials available at planning time. Developer generates a typed Sanity client singleton and a mock data layer. Real client activates when NEXT_PUBLIC_SANITY_PROJECT_ID env var is present.
